title: The Geographical Indications of Goods (Forms & making an appeal and fees therefore) Rules, 2013
description: The Geographical Indications of Goods (Forms & making an appeal and fees therefore) Rules, 2013
text: NOTIFICATION New Delhi. the 15'“ May, 2013 6.111.314 (E) .- Whereas, cenam draft rules were published_, in exercise of the powers conte ed by section 87 of the Geographical Indications of Goods (Registration and Protection) Act, 1999 (48 of 999), vide notification of the Government of lndla tn the Ministry of Commerce and Industry (Depart nt of Industrial Policy and Promotion) number G.S.R. 31(E) dated 21" January, 2013 inviting objectlo s and suggestions from all persons likely to be affected thereby before the expiry of forty five days from tit date on whlch copies of the Officlal Gazette containing the notification were made available to the public; And whereas, the copies of the Official Gazette containing the said notification were made available to the public on 21" January, 2013; And whereas, no objection and suggestions were received by the Central Government; Now therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred under section 87 of the Geographical 1nd anon of Goods(Registrat‘Ion and Protection)Act, 1999(48 of 1999), the Central Government hereby ma 5 the following rules:- 1.Short title and commencement. — (1) These rules may be called the Geogr hical Indications of Goods (Forms & making an appeal and fees therefore) Rules, 2013. (2) They shall come Into force on the date of their pubtication in the Official Gazette. 2. Form of Application .— The form of making applications for appeal to the Intellectual Property Appellate Board and the manner of verification thereof shall be as provided in the First Schedule to these rules. 3. Fees .- The fees for filing an appeal before the Intellectual Property Appellate Board shall be as specrfied in the Second Schedule to these rules which shall be paid by way of bank draft payable at Chennai dn wn in favour of the Deputy Registrar.
